name: memory-evals
description: External evaluation runners for Agent Builder memory benchmarks. Standalone — not part of the Kibana monorepo.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b _shared longmemeval locomo memoryagentbench mem2act memground
scripts.lint: eslint --max-warnings=0 _shared/src longmemeval/src locomo/src memoryagentbench/src mem2act/src memground/src
